utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item includes full details: coverage description, cost details (monthly and annual), and relevant features. The total_budget section provides complete cost breakdown including monthly_total, annual_total, setup_fee, and savings metrics. Therefore, all required items are fully covered with complete details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes four main components: (1) LifeFirst Standard Plan for health coverage, (2) a property coverage description that best corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Coverage under home_content, (3) a travel coverage that corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel_insurance, and (4) additional services that match the Insurance Portfolio Management (setup fee €300, one-time) from general_services. The ratings for these items are found directly in the ground-truth ratings list. Therefore, the mappings are as follows: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel) = 7, Insurance Portfolio Management = 9.
